segments.text: Theocoll engineers were concerned because cold could slow the O-rings at the exact moment they needed to seal.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Their recommendation was clear.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Do not launch below 53 degrees Fahrenheit.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That number mattered because it was tied to the lowest relevant prior experience they believed they could defend.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: NASA managers pushed back.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: In a technical review, pushback can be necessary.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The danger was the standard that began to govern the room.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The question drifted.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Show that this is safe to fly.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Became prove that it will fail.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That shift reversed the burden of proof.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Instead of requiring evidence that launch was safe, the process demanded evidence that failure was certain.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Engineering evidence usually does not arrive that way.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It arrives as a missing margin, a condition outside experience, a trend with enough signal to matter before the catastrophe supplies certainty.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The engineers had evidence of risk.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: They did not have an equation that converted temperature into guaranteed loss of vehicle.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That absence became useful to the launch case.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Theakol asked for an offline caucus.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The caucus lasted far longer than the five minutes first requested.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: When they returned, the recommendation had changed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The new position was that the data was inconclusive and launch could proceed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The cold had not changed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The joint had not changed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The limits of the data had not changed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The decision frame changed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: One instruction from that caucus still carries the shape of the moment.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Jerry Mason told Bob Lund to take off his engineering hat and put on his management hat.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: No single phrase explains the disaster.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: No single person explains it either.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The deeper fact is that the same process could take a specific engineering objection and return a launch recommendation from the same evidence.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The launch eve reversal is dramatic, but it is not the whole failure.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: A warning also has to travel.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It has to move from hardware to engineers, from engineers to managers, from contractors to NASA, from lower review levels to the people with authority to stop the launch.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: At each step, the signal can be compressed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Compression is normal in large programs, but when compression changes an active objection into a resolved item, the system has made a decision without naming it directly.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
